member.name: M:TaskTracker.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddApiServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds API-specific services including controllers, Swagger, and health checks.

member.name: M:TaskTracker.API.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions.UseApiPipeline(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Configures the HTTP request pipeline for the API.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Entry point for integration test hosting.
